meta_title: Car Rental in Sydney, NSW — Find & Compare Options
meta_description: Looking for car rental in Sydney? Explore pickup locations at Sydney Airport and across the city. Find the right car for your Sydney trip.
h1: Car Rental in Sydney, New South Wales
intro_paragraph: Sydney is Australia's largest city and its primary international gateway, served by Sydney Kingsford Smith Airport just eight kilometres south of the city center. Car rental is widely available at the airport and at numerous city center locations. While Sydney's inner suburbs are well served by public transport, a rental car is genuinely valuable for exploring the broader New South Wales region. The Blue Mountains are under two hours west of the city, the Hunter Valley wine region is roughly two hours north, and the Royal National Park lies immediately south. For visitors planning to travel beyond Sydney itself — whether along the Pacific Highway to Queensland or south toward Canberra and Victoria — a rental car is the most practical and flexible option.

faq.question: Where can I pick up a rental car at Sydney Airport?
faq.answer: Car rental desks are located in the arrivals area of both the International Terminal (T1) and the Domestic Terminal (T2/T3) at Sydney Airport. The rental car pickup bays are located on the ground level of each terminal's multi-storey car park. Signs in the arrivals hall direct you to the rental car counters. Most major Australian and international rental brands are represented.

faq.question: Can I drive from Sydney to other Australian states?
faq.answer: Yes, inter-state road travel is permitted and most rental suppliers allow vehicles to cross Australian state borders. Popular drives from Sydney include the Pacific Highway to Brisbane (approximately 10 hours), the Princes Highway south to Melbourne (approximately 10 hours), and the Hume Motorway to Canberra (approximately 3 hours). Always confirm inter-state permissions with your supplier before booking, as some vehicle types or rental categories may have restrictions.

faq.question: What is the minimum age to rent a car in Sydney?
faq.answer: Most rental suppliers in Sydney require drivers to be at least 21 years old. Drivers aged 21 to 24 are generally subject to a young driver surcharge. Some suppliers offer rentals to drivers aged 18 to 20, though surcharges apply and vehicle choice may be limited. Requirements vary between suppliers, so confirm minimum age conditions at the time of booking.
